div.h2: Module Lifecycle: insmod → init → running → rmmod → exit
div.p: Kernel module state machine — Linux loadable module infrastructure
● UNLOADED hello.ko on disk No kernel memory No sysfs entries

LOADING finit_module() syscall active ───────────────── • vmalloc(.text/.data/.bss) • ELF relocation patching • Symbol resolution via kernel exported sym table • vermagic check • module_param writes ───────────────── CAP_SYS_MODULE required

INIT_RUNNING module_init() executing ───────────────── • hello_init() runs in insmod process context • buffer_size validated • printk(KERN_INFO …) • Returns 0 or -errno ───────────────── Ring 0, process context Sleep permitted (GFP_KERNEL ok)

LIVE Module fully active ───────────────── • lsmod shows entry • /sys/module/hello/ visible • /sys/module/hello/parameters/ buffer_size (0444) • module refcnt tracked • Code in kernel vmalloc space ───────────────── Invariant: buffer_size ∈ [1,1048576] MODULE_LICENSE("GPL") gates EXPORT_SYMBOL_GPL access

INIT_FAILED module_init() returned -errno ───────────────── • -EINVAL: buffer_size ≤ 0 • -ENOMEM: kzalloc failed • -ENODEV: registration failed ───────────────── insmod reports error to shell errno propagated to userspace

UNLOADING module_exit() executing ───────────────── • hello_exit() runs in rmmod process context • printk(KERN_INFO "unloaded") • /sys/module/hello/ removed • Unconditional — cannot fail • No return value checked ───────────────── __exit section reclaimed vmalloc pages freed by free_module() after exit()
rmmod BLOCKED (M2+ with open fds) ───────────────── module refcnt > 0 try_module_get() held by open file descriptors ───────────────── EBUSY returned to rmmod Module remains LIVE
__init / __exit ELF sections: __init → .init.text — freed by kernel after init() returns 0 (page reclaim) __exit → .exit.text — discarded if module compiled obj-y (built-in)
